properties.name: Navy Base San Diego Pass and ID

tags.description:
Customers are served on a first come, first served basis.

The Pass and Decal office is responsible for authenticating individual's identity, vetting and determining their fitness prior to authorizing access to the installation.
tags.name: Navy Base San Diego Pass and ID
